title: Deer Mod
description: This mod adds deers to the game!
body:
# 🦌 Deer Mod 🦌
![A picture that briefly lists the content of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94530829343b0e3bdab7fb2290a5d823d9c66f9e_0.webp)

**I truly love deers, that's why I decided to make this simple mod that adds those beautiful animals to Minecraft!** 🦌🦌🦌

### Requests:
- You can send your requests for other versions of Minecraft or other mod loaders in the issue section of the mod's issues page

### What does the mod add?
- Raidable Deers! 🦌
- Deer Crackers! 🍘
- Deer Pattern for Banners and Shields! 🛡️
- And more! ✨

📖 **For more information check up the Deer Mod [wiki](https://codeberg.org/ArisuwuMei/DeerMod/wiki)!** 📖

### Dependecies:
- GeckoLib **(only for Deer Mod 0.1.*)**
